canonical_definition: The observable task of selecting a set of genes to perturb in an experimental round to maximize the discovery of 'hit' genes with a desired phenotype.
papers: BioDiscoveryAgent: An AI Agent for Designing Genetic Perturbation Experiments
Scaling Autonomous Agents via Automatic Reward Modeling And Planning

definitions.text: The task of performing simulated science experiments by navigating an environment, manipulating objects, and observing outcomes to test a hypothesis or achieve a goal.

relationships.evidence: ScienceWorld (Wang et al., 2022a) is an interactive benchmark designed for embodied science experiments. (Section 4.1)
